heading: Undefinitized contractual actions: required description of anticipated effect on military department requirements if use of undefinitized contractual action results in delay
label: 3371 Undefinitized contractual actions: required description of anticipated effect on military department requirements if use of undefinitized contractual action results in delay
text: The head of an agency may not enter into an undefinitized contractual action unless the request to the head of the agency for authorization of the contractual action includes a description of the anticipated effect on requirements of the military department concerned if a delay is incurred for purposes of determining contractual terms, specifications, and price before performance is begun under the contractual action.
